command:
node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/run.ts --format json >/tmp/m115-secondary-report.json && python3 - <<'PY'
import json
with open('/tmp/m115-secondary-report.json') as f:
    data=json.load(f)
print(json.dumps({
  'verdict': data['summary']['verdict'],
  'secondaryParitySummary': data['secondaryParity']['summary'],
  'secondarySurfaceIds': [s['id'] for s in data['secondaryParity']['surfaces']]
}, indent=2))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, json
cmds = [
  "node --experimental-strip-types tests/parity/run.ts --format json",
  "node --import ./src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs --experimental-strip-types --test src/tests/integration/secondary-parity-report-contract.test.ts",
  "node --import ./src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs --experimental-strip-types --test src/tests/integration/parity-baseline-contract.test.ts",
]
for cmd in cmds:
    start=time.time()
    p=subprocess.run(cmd,shell=True,cwd='.',stdout=subprocess.PIPE,stderr=subprocess.PIPE,text=True)
    dur=int((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print(json.dumps({'command':cmd,'exitCode':p.returncode,'durationMs':dur}))
PY
